title: UNCTAD Maritime Country Profile — United States
time_coverage: 2024 (latest annual snapshot; profile also includes select multi-year time series charts)
units: described within PDF (population millions, GDP current US$ millions, fleet counts/DWT, TEU, etc.)
license_terms: UNCTAD public statistical publication; standard UN data terms of use
notes: Direct PDF download from UNCTADstat Country Profile Maritime Profile tool, country code 840 (UN M49 numeric code). Downloaded as a natural comparator alongside Iran since UNCTAD publishes this exact profile template for every UN M49 country code — one source covers all target comparators. USA required code 840 (not 842, which 404s).
